---
author: Sam White
toc-title: Contents
toc-depth: 5
toc-location: left
title: De Novo Transcriptome Assembly and Annotation - E5 P.evermanni RNA-seq Using Trinity and PASA
date: '2026-02-27'
draft: true
engine: knitr
categories: 
  - "2026"
  - "Trinity"
  - "E5"
  - "PASA"
  - "transcriptome assembly"
  - "Porites evermanni"
---
